title: The Shiny Pack
description: The Shiny Pack is a highly optimized Cobblemon modpack, perfect for playing on any server, with a focus on providing the best experience for players of the CobblemonEX server. Enjoy smooth gameplay with up to 2000 FPS.
body:
### The Shiny Pack - A Cobblemon Adventure for All!

Welcome to **The Shiny Pack**, a specially crafted Cobblemon modpack designed for seamless play on any server, with a focus on delivering the best experience for the players of our own server, **CobblemonEX**, formerly knowned as **Ruinous Horizons**. Whether you're looking to explore vast new biomes, capture and train your favorite Pokémons, or engage in epic battles, this modpack has everything for your Minecraft journey.

Optimized for high performance, **The Shiny Pack** brings smooth gameplay with potential FPS boosts of up to **2000 FPS**, ensuring that your game stays responsive and lag-free. While it’s made with [CobblemonEX](https://discord.gg/KgbkX8kNvq) players in mind, this modpack is compatible for anyone looking to dive into the world of Cobblemon on any server.

Join us on [CobblemonEX](https://discord.gg/KgbkX8kNvq) or bring **The Shiny Pack** to your own adventures—either way, you're in for an unforgettable experience!
